attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMP.MESSAGE_ID) + MAX_VAL RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY,
SMP.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID
FROM  
	(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CONFIRMATION) SMPO,
	(SELECT  SMET.MESSAGE_ID
	FROM (
	SELECT 
	SXMHI.MESSAGE_ID,
	SXMHI.GLOBAL_NAME,
	SXMHI.PO_NUMBER
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C9_HDR_IB_IFAC SXMHI	
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EXMHI.MESSAGE_ID,
	EXMHI.GLOBAL_NAME,
	EXMHI.PO_NUMBER
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C9_HDR_IB_IFAC EXMHI	) SMET
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		ON SMET.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	INNER JOIN (SELECT NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,MIN(NSPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
		FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NSPO
		WHERE SS_CD='CG'
		GROUP BY NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM) NPOK
		ON NPOK.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SMET.PO_NUMBER)SMP
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 
	1 
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CONFIRMATION SPO
	WHERE SPO.SK_MESSAGE_ID = SMP.MESSAGE_ID
	)

SELECT 
SXMHI.MESSAGE_ID,
SXMHI.CREATION_DATE,
SXMHI.CREATED_BY,
SXMHI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SXMHI.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SXMHI.PO_NUMBER,
SXMHI.RECEIPT_DATE_TIME,
SXMHI.SO_NUMBER,
SXMHI.PARTNER_NAME,
SXMHI.ORG_CODE,
SXMHI.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER,
SXMHI.PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER,
SXMHI.RETURN_FROM,
SXMHI.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
SXMHI.PROCESS_STATUS,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE1,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE2,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE3,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE4,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE5,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE6,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE7,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE8,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE9,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE10,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE11,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE12,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE13,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE14,
SXMHI.ATTRIBUTE15,
SXMHI.REQUEST_ID,
SXMHI.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SXMHI.GLOBAL_NAME,
SXMHI.BATCH_ID,
SXMHI.CREATE_DATETIME,
SXMHI.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C9_HDR_IB_IFAC SXMHI
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 
			FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE SXMHI.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		   ) OR
NOT EXISTS (
	SELECT 1
	FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NSPO	
	WHERE NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SXMHI.PO_NUMBER
	AND SS_CD='CG'	
)

SELECT 
SRIRC.RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY AS RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY,
COALESCE(SXMHI.RECEIPT_DATE_TIME,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS  RECEIPT_DTM,
COALESCE(SXMHI.CREATION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  CREATE_DT,    
CASE SXMHI.PROCESS_STATUS WHEN 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED'WHEN 'N' THEN 'NEW' WHEN 'E' THEN 'ERROR' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  AS  PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SXMHI.TRANSMISSION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  TRANSMISSION_DT, 
SXMHI.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,
NPOK.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
NPOK.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NRIRC.RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	SXMH.MESSAGE_ID,
	SXMH.GLOBAL_NAME,
	SXMH.PO_NUMBER,
	SXMH.RECEIPT_DATE_TIME,
	SXMH.CREATION_DATE,
	SXMH.PROCESS_STATUS,
	SXMH.TRANSMISSION_DATE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C9_HDR_IB_IFAC SXMH	
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
	EXMHI.MESSAGE_ID,
	EXMHI.GLOBAL_NAME,
	EXMHI.PO_NUMBER,
	EXMHI.RECEIPT_DATE_TIME,
	EXMHI.CREATION_DATE,
	EXMHI.PROCESS_STATUS,
	EXMHI.TRANSMISSION_DATE
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C9_HDR_IB_IFAC EXMHI
	)SXMHI

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON SXMHI.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CONFIRMATION SRIRC
	ON  SXMHI.MESSAGE_ID = SRIRC.SK_MESSAGE_ID 
INNER JOIN (SELECT NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,MIN(NSPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
	FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NSPO
	WHERE SS_CD='CG'
	GROUP BY NSPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM) NPOK
	ON NPOK.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SXMHI.PO_NUMBER	
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CONFIRMATION NRIRC
	ON SXMHI.MESSAGE_ID = NRIRC.SK_MESSAGE_ID
